trusted_seed.role: audited C11 artifact used to start the Kofun-written compiler

stage1.role: Kofun-written compiler for the documented arithmetic Core subset

stage2_frontend_checkpoint.role: Kofun lexer, structural parser, textual IR, and deterministic source projection; not an executable self-recompile

native_checkpoint.role: Kofun-authored ELF64/x86-64 encoder with an executable static image gate

stage2.implementation: stage1 compiles its own source and reproduces an equivalent artifact

truthful_status: The repository contains a Python-free Kofun-written compiler seed. It is not fully self-hosting because Stage 1 cannot semantically compile its complete own source.
